trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The order #000000657 shows Order Status = Complete, Item Status = Shipped with Qty Shipped = 1, Total Paid = $114.94, and Total Refunded = $0.00. There are NO entries listed under Comments History or Staff Notes indicating delivery confirmation, tracking number, carrier details, or prior customer communication.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order View page (http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/657/), specifically the Items Ordered section (showing Shipped: 1) and the Comments History tab (no records present).
WHY IT MATTERS: While the system marks the order as shipped and complete, the absence of any Comments History or staff notes with tracking or delivery confirmation means there is no evidence the customer actually received the item. Because the customer claims non-receipt and there is insufficient documentation to confirm delivery, the request cannot be safely approved or denied without further investigation (e.g., shipment tracking, carrier confirmation).
